description_long: This is a large, rectangular, industrial shipping container with a weathered, rusted exterior. The container is primarily constructed from corrugated metal panels, giving it a ribbed texture along its sides and top. Its surface is predominantly a faded reddish-brown with patches of black corrosion and a faint horizontal gray stripe, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. One end features large, double doors that are partially open, revealing a spacious, empty interior with a metal floor. The doors are reinforced with vertical metal bars and heavy-duty hinges, suitable for secure closure and transport. Faint white alphanumeric markings are visible on the side, suggesting identification or inventory codes.
description: A large, rusted metal shipping container with double doors and visible weathering, featuring faded markings and a ribbed exterior.
description_view_0: The end of the container is visible, showing a solid, closed panel with heavy rust and no visible openings.
description_view_1: The side and partially open double doors are visible, revealing the container's empty interior and faded white markings on the side.
description_view_2: The opposite end of the container is shown with both doors fully open, exposing the entire entryway and interior space.
description_view_3: The side view with both doors open, showing the ribbed metal surface, faded markings, and the open entry at one end.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: faint white alphanumeric markings on the side
